subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-27 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: For thirteen years, the Apostle of God (may the blessings of God be upon Him) was in Mecca, where He was subjected constantly to persecution
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت رسول ص سیزده سال در مکه بودند و همیشه مبتلای زجر و زحمت معاندین ایشانرا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @episodes from the early history of Islam, @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @rejection of Muhammad
